prompt:
In modern society recent topic has sparked in the debates, is it better for the community if the young people go directly to the workforce rather than go to the university? Many of people advocates that idea of gaining practical experience after school graduate. However, I strongly against that for this two reasons.

The major point is that young people after graduating from secondary school are still kids, they are not mature for such a crucial choice. And by picking that narrow path they limit their perspectives in future. On the other hand, university propose you an opportunity to self-grouth and foster your curiosity which is important in the rapidly changing landscape of workforce market. For example, I'm working as a teacher in school and I see how it's so hard for my students to find the right path and sometimes they can make a lot of silly choices.

Moreover, many employs required from you university degree to apply for job. Therefore, university degree has become necessity in the modern world, a lot of internships are only available for students from the prestigious universities. For instance, I'm researching a lot through labor market and the first question on the interviews: there are you study? It's 

say something. 

To sum up everything, I believe that for flourishing society the only right choice for young people is to go directly to university after graduating from school

messages.content:
You are an expert CEFR writing assessor.
Assess the student text using the provided task/context blocks as supporting evidence.
Use EXPERT_ANNOTATION, CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES, RETRIEVED_ERROR_SPANS, and RANKING_ANCHORS only as supporting context; never override direct evidence from the student text.
Return ONLY one CEFR label from: A1|A2|B1|B2|C1|C2.
Do not output JSON.
Do not output explanation.

TASK: There is an opinion that too many young people now want to get a university degree. It would be better for society if most of them start working after finishing secondary school. How much do you agree with this point of view? State your opinion and give at least two arguments to support it.
STUDENT_TEXT: In modern society recent topic has sparked in the debates, is it better for the community if the young people go directly to the workforce rather than go to the university? Many of people advocates that idea of gaining practical experience after school graduate. However, I strongly against that for this two reasons.

The major point is that young people after graduating from secondary school are still kids, they are not mature for such a crucial choice. And by picking that narrow path they limit their perspectives in future. On the other hand, university propose you an opportunity to self-grouth and foster your curiosity which is important in the rapidly changing landscape of workforce market. For example, I'm working as a teacher in school and I see how it's so hard for my students to find the right path and sometimes they can make a lot of silly choices.

Moreover, many employs required from you university degree to apply for job. Therefore, university degree has become necessity in the modern world, a lot of internships are only available for students from the prestigious universities. For instance, I'm researching a lot through labor market and the first question on the interviews: there are you study? It's 

say something. 

To sum up everything, I believe that for flourishing society the only right choice for young people is to go directly to university after graduating from school 
TEXT_TYPE: essay

CALIBRATION_EXAMPLES: [{"ref_id":"sample_07011","cefr_level":"B1","task":"You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hi, I know some people who have the simular problem. So, let me try to give you few tips about solving it.

Firstly, the most important thing is time managment. You need to understand when you sleep, eat, go for a walk, etc.

Then, I think it's very nice to solve problems when they was given for you. Don't put them closely to deadlines. If you don't do it, you will have to make many tasks in one-two days. It's surely not good.

My final tip is about eating healthy food. Yes, this tip is really obvios, but without it you probably will have a lot of health difficulties.

So, I hope my tips will help you to get more free time! And it's interesting for me to know, what do you think about it?","expert_annotation":{"annotator_id":8,"errors":[{"text":"simular","labels":["Spelling"],"start":36,"end":43},{"text":"few","labels":["Grammar"],"start":80,"end":83},{"text":"managment","labels":["Spelling"],"start":150,"end":159},{"text":"nice","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":250,"end":254},{"text":"for","labels":["Grammar"],"start":293,"end":296},{"text":"was","labels":["Grammar"],"start":283,"end":286},{"text":"put them","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":308,"end":316},{"text":"closely to deadlines.","labels":["Lexical choice"],"start":317,"end":338},{"text":" one-two","labels":["Grammar"],"start":394,"end":402},{"text":"obvios","labels":["Spelling"],"start":499,"end":505},{"text":"you probably will ","labels":["Sentence structure"],"start":522,"end":540},{"text":" what do you think about it?","labels":["Sentence structure"],"start":668,"end":696},{"text":" know, what","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":662,"end":673}],"strengths":[{"text":"Firstly","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":108,"end":115},{"text":"My final tip ","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":432,"end":445},{"text":"probably ","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":526,"end":535},{"text":"Then","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":226,"end":230}],"comments":[["significant"]]}},{"ref_id":"sample_07070","cefr_level":"B2","task":"There is an opinion that too many young people now want to get a university degree. It would be better for society if most of them start working after finishing secondary school. How much do you agree with this point of view? State your opinion and give at least two arguments to support it.","student_text":"There is an opinion that young people should go to work after school. I cannnot agree with this point. Let me explain.

Of course, going to work early sounds good. A person begins to gain work experience, builds a career and earns money for himself. This is a good opportunity for people who are confident in themselves and have decided on the field in which they want to work.

But there is different situation. School graduates often don't know what they want to do and where they want to work. Or maybe they want to work in science or in other difficult area. In this situation university is the best choice. In the university people study different complex subjects. They can try various fields and choose what they like. And knowledge that university gives is complex.

To sum it up, there is no one right answer to this question.The choice depends on the situation and needs of a particular person.","expert_annotation":{"annotator_id":6,"errors":[{"text":"cannnot ","labels":["Spelling"],"start":72,"end":80},{"text":"different situation","labels":["Grammar"],"start":392,"end":411},{"text":" other","labels":["Grammar"],"start":540,"end":546},{"text":"In the university","labels":["Grammar"],"start":612,"end":629},{"text":"knowledge","labels":["Grammar"],"start":730,"end":739},{"text":" university","labels":["Grammar"],"start":744,"end":755},{"text":"To sum it up,","labels":["Discourse markers"],"start":775,"end":788},{"text":"there is no one right answer","labels":["Sentence structure"],"start":789,"end":817},{"text":"needs","labels":["Grammar"],"start":875,"end":880}],"strengths":[{"text":"Of course,","labels":["Discourse markers ✓"],"start":120,"end":130},{"text":"But there is different situation.","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":379,"end":412},{"text":"Or maybe they want","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":497,"end":515},{"text":"They can try","labels":["Rhetorical features ✓"],"start":671,"end":683}],"comments":[]}},{"ref_id":"sample_07013","cefr_level":"A2","task":"You read this post in the Telegram chat of first year students: It is so difficult to study in university! I don't have any free time at all! Write an answer to this post (10 sentences) and give some tips on how to organise your days to have more free time.","student_text":"Hi, im styduing in the MIPT - in one of the hardest technical universitiyes in Russia, and i want to give you some advices.

My first advidce - it to sleep from 7 to 9 hours (how much exactly depends from you) in day, and you should stand from up and go to bed in one time in day. With sleeping regulary in one time you will feel better and maybe you will feel better.

Next advice - it to make calendar with notions, or something like this, it helps to plan day wery succesfull. Sometimes procrastination wins you, but with notions it weel be easier to make hometasks in time.

The third advice - food delivery, if you have not enought time to cook something, or to go somewhere in big sity you can easily get food from delivery services. But sometimes people eats only food from delivery, and even don't go out from their rooms, of course it isn't good.

And the last what i want to say - probably your biggest troubles with time it that you have not hard character. Without this super ability it hard to self-controle, may be you should to ask your friends wathching what are you doing in free time, they can anounce if you spend time on games or other time-killers.

I believe that my advices can help to had more free time, good bye.","expert_annotation":{"annotator_id":5,"errors":[{"text":"im","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":4,"end":6},{"text":"styduing","labels":["Spelling"],"start":7,"end":15},{"text":"in the MIPT","labels":["Grammar"],"start":16,"end":27},{"text":" in","labels":["Grammar"],"start":29,"end":32},{"text":"i","labels":["Punctuation"],"start":91,"end":92},{"text":"some advices","labels":["Grammar"],"start":110,"end":122},{"text":"advidce","labels":["Grammar"],"start":134,"end":141},{"text":"advidce","labels":["Spelling"],"start":134,"end":141},{"text":"it to sleep","labels":["Grammar","Spelling"],"start":144,"end":155},{"text":"depends from","labels":["Grammar","Spelling"],"start":192,"end":204},{"text":"in day","labels":["Grammar"],"start":210,"end":216},{"text":"stand from up","labels":["Grammar"],"start":233,"end":246},{"text":"","labels":["Grammar","Lexical choice"],"start":261,"end":261},{"text":" in day.
